## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Projectmark and GrowthX to discuss SEO progress and content strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/PdRPyX9KKgaGRyJ8nNzGh8nBuifwz2m8?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content publishing progress: Some backlogged blogs published, new approved blogs pending](https://fathom.video/share/PdRPyX9KKgaGRyJ8nNzGh8nBuifwz2m8?tab=summary&timestamp=141.0)
  - [SEO potential: Website has good authority, historical traffic \~900+ visitors (Jan)](https://fathom.video/share/PdRPyX9KKgaGRyJ8nNzGh8nBuifwz2m8?tab=summary&timestamp=226.0)
  - [Keyword strategy: 50 new keywords researched, \~85/200 articles completed](https://fathom.video/share/PdRPyX9KKgaGRyJ8nNzGh8nBuifwz2m8?tab=summary&timestamp=493.0)
  - [Schedule: No meetings next week, 2-week break in late Dec/early Jan](https://fathom.video/share/PdRPyX9KKgaGRyJ8nNzGh8nBuifwz2m8?tab=summary&timestamp=275.0)

## Topics

### Content Publishing Progress
